name: VWAP&TRIX
python_code:
Period = 12
SigPeriod = 5
A = (_sum(df['close'], (df['high']+df['low']+df['close'])/3 * df['volume']))
B = (_sum(df['close'], df['volume']))
D_VWAP = ((A - pd.Series(np.where(Date.shift(1) != Date, A.shift(1), np.nan), index=df.index).ffill()) / (B - pd.Series(np.where(Date.shift(1) != Date, B.shift(1), np.nan), index=df.index).ffill()))
T = (TI.trix(df['close'], Period))
S = (_ma(T, SigPeriod))
cond = (df['close'] > D_VWAP) & (((T.shift(1) <= S.shift(1)) & (T > S)))
